title: pinus halepensis var. abasica
intro: Pinus halepensis var. abasica, also known as Aleppo pine, is a variety of evergreen tree native to the Mediterranean region. The resin of this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Pinus halepensis var. abasica include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and acting as an antioxidant to combat free radicals. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and poultices, which can be applied topically or ingested in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
